action.reasoning: Observation: /rab_data/asvspoof2021_la contains train/ and dev/ subdirectories, flac/ not at top level. Analysis: need to point flac directories to train/flac/ and dev/flac/ inside dataset. Decision: verify flac directories with ls, update train.py with correct paths, train 2 epochs (frozen XLS-R-300M) to get baseline EER and time measurement, then submit eval.
action.command: ls /rab_data/asvspoof2021_la/train/flac | head -3 && ls /rab_data/asvspoof2021_la/dev/flac | head -3 && python train.py --epochs 2 --batch_size 32
